emails.subject: New Resume
emails.body: New Resume Dear Vince, I am so grateful for your efforts. I really appreciate you taking time from your busy schedule. If you have not contacted Michael Maddox, it's even better. I have updated and re-worded my resume to better reflect my accomplishments. Would you please contact Michael Maddox of CERA and forward my resume to him? His contact information is (617) 497 6446 or email: mmaddox@cera.com Have you had a chance to talk to David Port? Maybe there are other options. I am flexible and willing to do whatever it takes. Sincerely, Bessik Matchavariani Manager Enron Broadband Services Tel: 713.345.7230 Fax: 713.646.8861 bessik_matchavariani@enron.net
